text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
So you have come, Doto, to the castle<n>that crowns
the sacred ground where<n>my love for opera beats
strongest—the Takurazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
You are Cinderella, waiting for her<n>dance at the
castle, her evil<n>stepsisters (the other racers) rife
with<n>envy!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Will I, the lord of the castle, claim<n>victory? Will the
princess? Or<n>perhaps... those evil stepsisters?

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Now, the royal drama of the<n>Takarazuka Kinen
begins!
